description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Extension Builds that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a Windows 10 job with a matrix strategy to build extensions for different targets, including master Editor and master Release. For each target, clone the repository and godot-cpp, load the scons cache, set up Python 3.x, install scons and pywin32, compile the extension using scons, and upload the resulting artifact.
